passport.label: Passport number
passport.help: Printed on the photo page of your passport. Letters and numbers only.

errors.tooShort: Passport number too short — min 6 characters
errors.tooLong: Passport number too long — max 12 characters
errors.invalidChars: Letters and numbers only — no spaces or symbols

full_name.label: Full name (as in passport)
full_name.help: Exactly as shown on your passport (Latin letters only). Family name first, then given names — this matches Vietnamese name order convention.

errors.invalidChars: Use the Latin spelling from your passport — no accents or special characters

date_of_birth.label: Date of birth
date_of_birth.help: Format: DD/MM/YYYY on the form, but accept YYYY-MM-DD here

errors.tooEarly: Date of birth seems too far in the past — double check
errors.tooLate: Date of birth cannot be in the future

passport_expiry.label: Passport expiry date
passport_expiry.help: Must be at least 6 months after your planned arrival

errors.tooEarly: Passport must be valid at least 6 months after arrival

intended_arrival.label: Intended date of entry
intended_arrival.help: Format: YYYY-MM-DD — when you plan to enter Vietnam. E-visa is valid for 90 days from this date.

errors.required: Intended date of entry is required
errors.tooLate: Date too far in the future

port_of_entry.label: Allowed port of entry
port_of_entry.help: Pick the airport, land border, or seaport you plan to use. Vietnam's e-visa lists ~30 approved entry points.

purpose_of_entry.label: Purpose of entry
purpose_of_entry.help: Tourism, business, transit, family visit, study, etc.

accommodation.label: Address in Vietnam
accommodation.placeholder: Hotel Example, 123 Nguyen Hue, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City
accommodation.help: First night's address. Hotel name + street + city is enough.

email.label: Email
email.help: Approval letter and e-visa PDF are sent here.
